mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE status = 0 AND create_time < #{timeout} AND deleted = 0

SELECT o.id, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.user_id AS userId, u.username AS username, u.phone AS userPhone, o.show_id AS showId, s.name AS showTitle, s.poster AS showCover, o.theater_id AS theaterId, t.name AS theaterName, o.session_id AS sessionId, ss.show_time AS showTime, o.seat_count AS seatCount, o.total_price AS totalPrice, o.status, o.pay_method AS payMethod, o.pay_time AS payTime, o.expire_time AS expireTime, o.transaction_id AS transactionId, o.remark, o.create_time AS createTime, o.update_time AS updateTime FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN `show` s ON o.show_id = s.id LEFT JOIN theater t ON o.theater_id = t.id LEFT JOIN session ss ON o.session_id = ss.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId} AND o.deleted = 0
SELECT oi.id, oi.seat_number AS seatNumber, seat.row_num AS rowNum, seat.col_num AS colNum, oi.price FROM order_item oi LEFT JOIN seat ON oi.seat_id = seat.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}
